text.title: ADR Supersession Detection Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Script auto-flags + auto-marks superseded; old context lost.
Half of corpus is free-form; detection false-negatives.
antipattern.fix: Enforce template; flag non-conforming ADRs separately.

antipattern.symptom: Last scan 14 months ago; stale ADRs guide bad decisions.
